item.title: Han Solo is annoyed right now
item.dc:creator: 1mthedude

item.title: 45 lbs weight loss
item.description: Look at my face, y’all! I don’t see the face progress irl but I really do see it in these pictures! ETA: this has taken about 10 months so it’s been slow. I haven’t done anything exciting except tracking calories in Lifesum and (obviously) eaten less. Haven’t work out much at all but I’m hoping to improve on that. :)
item.dc:creator: ssmc

item.title: My Zatanna Cosplay Improvement
item.description: SnarkyJayCosplay here— was editing and decided to put a little comparison together! I’m really happy with the 2024 version of my Zatanna cosplay— the suit screams “Magician” (it’s more cohesive to me) and the tights are sparkly (what more could anyone want?). Plus my edit is more dynamic: I think it flows better and looks a little more “real?” I’m no photoshop expert by any means, but I’ve certainly improved. 2023 will probably be preferred by some for a number of reasons… but hey, I feel like I’m growing as an artist and wanted to share that.
item.dc:creator: rectalpossum

item.title: My Friend Might Not Be Human
item.description:
A oneshot indie manga created by https://lit.link/en/asaaa819 (author) and https://twitter.com/sayaaa_70 (artist). Translated by me, with permission. Enjoy!
"I think everyone deserves a friend" - Bob Ross Don't forget to also be true to yourself. I'm sure Tanuko would love Tenko all the same if she knew the truth. She certainly did get excited by the idea that her friend might be the same as her. The human friends will come eventually. Tenko's heart is in the right place, at least. Thanks for reading!
item.dc:creator: WyrdJP

item.title: I just learned that seals' nostrils close tightly as soon as they are underwater. It’s well done!I figured maybe you didn't know that either, so here you go
item.dc:creator: maureoko

item.title: Cappuccino loves his Mama
item.description: Little boy Cappuccino is starting to get a lot more mobile. And his eyes are almost all the way open! I caught a cute little moment between him and his mama, Java. She is so patient and she loves her babies SO much. She’s one of the most attentive mama cats I’ve ever had. I’m going out of town tomorrow morning for a week and I am gonna miss these guys so much! Gotta soak up all the kitten love I can tonight. (Check out Cappy’s little sis!! https://imgur.com/gallery/Cd4hPcF )
item.dc:creator: KittensForDays

item.title: My obscure bucket list wish was that all five of my animals would be with each other on the couch or bed without fighting, and this week, it happened!!!
item.dc:creator: IAmSailorMoonMoon
